title: Bridgerton

characters.name: Daphne Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The Diamond of the Season (S1). The eldest daughter who must marry well. Marries the Duke of Hastings.

characters.name: Anthony Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The eldest brother. Viscount. Approaches every decision with a list. Falls for Kate Sharma in S2.

characters.name: Eloise Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The independent sister. Refuses the marriage market. Wants something more. Best friend turned betrayed by Penelope.

characters.name: Penelope Featherington
characters.archetype: Wallflower turned Lady Whistledown — the anonymous society writer everyone fears. Married Colin in S3.

characters.name: Colin Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The wandering middle Bridgerton. Eventually realizes Penelope was always the one. The S3 lead.

characters.name: Benedict Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The artist brother. Bisexual storyline. Masquerade ball heart-throb.

characters.name: Francesca Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The quiet Bridgerton. Married Lord John Stirling. Possibly queer storyline coming in S4.

characters.name: Hyacinth Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The youngest sister. Says the funniest thing in any room.

characters.name: Lady Danbury
characters.archetype: The Queen's confidante. Keeps everyone in line. Knows everything.

characters.name: Queen Charlotte
characters.archetype: The Queen of England. Declares the Diamond. Holds the social order in her hand. Got her own spinoff.

characters.name: Simon Basset (Duke of Hastings)
characters.archetype: The Duke who refuses to marry. Eventually marries Daphne. Disappeared after S1 (actor left).

characters.name: Kate Sharma
characters.archetype: Anthony's match in S2. Strong-willed, intelligent, the first to call him out.

characters.name: Edwina Sharma
characters.archetype: Kate's younger sister. Was supposed to marry Anthony. Walked out at the altar.

characters.name: Violet Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The matriarch. Mother of 8. Quietly the smartest person in the room.

signature_quotes: Dear reader, sources tell this author...
The Diamond of the Season has chosen.
Your eyes meet mine across a crowded ballroom...
viral_moments: Daphne and the Duke at the Trowbridge Ball — 'I burn for you'.
Anthony and Kate's wet-shirt confrontation in the rain.
The reveal of Penelope as Lady Whistledown.
The Queen at the diamond ceremony.
Eloise's first society debut — refusing it.
Colin proposing to Penelope in the carriage.
The Saltburn-coded scene that wasn't actually Saltburn but everyone confused them.
memes: 'I burn for you' as the most-quoted Bridgerton line — Twitter, TikTok, everywhere.
Anthony Bridgerton's 'I have a list' becoming the meme for type-A planners.
Lady Whistledown intro narration applied to every Twitter drama story.
'The Diamond of the Season' as shorthand for 'the It Girl right now'.
Penelope's 'glow-up' between S2 and S3 becoming a transformation meme.
Bridgerton-coded TikToks where someone wears a corset and acts pining.
off_screen_drama: Regé-Jean Page (the Duke) left after S1 — show survived but never quite regained the chemistry.
Phoebe Dynevor (Daphne) basically left after S1 too — only brief returns.
Nicola Coughlan being the romantic lead in S3 was a celebrated 'representation' moment for body diversity.
Showrunner change after S2 — Chris Van Dusen replaced by Jess Brownell.
Shonda Rhimes' deal with Netflix is rumored to be one of the largest in TV history.
Jonathan Bailey came out publicly during the S2 press tour and the response was hugely positive.
The S3 split-season release frustrated fans who waited 4 weeks between episodes 4 and 5.
running_jokes: The Bridgertons have 8 children but Violet seems to have aged 5 years total.
Anthony's 'list' that he never actually consults.
The 'we have so many siblings we forget some seasons' running gag.
Lady Whistledown writing about people while standing 5 feet from them.
Eloise just walking through scenes with a book and disapproving stare.
The Featherington women always wearing yellow no matter who's in charge.
Hyacinth being the funniest character despite having 3 lines per episode.
